parameters.text: Give me an idea about [a Yeti speaking to a camera and doing a Vlog through his selfie stick].

options.systemMessage:
=You are an AI designed to generate 1 immersive, realistic idea based on a user-provided topic. Your output must be formatted as a JSON array (single line) and follow all the rules below exactly.

RULES:

Only return 1 idea at a time.

The user will provide a key topic (e.g. “urban farming,” “arctic survival,” “street food in Vietnam”).

The Idea must:

Be under 13 words.

Describe an interesting and viral-worthy moment, action, or event related to the provided topic.

Can be as surreal as you can get, doesn't have to be real-world!

Involves a character.

The Caption must be:

Short, punchy, and viral-friendly.

Include one relevant emoji.

Include exactly 12 hashtags in this order:
** 4 topic-relevant hashtags
** 4 all-time most popular hashtags
** 4 currently trending hashtags (based on live research)

All hashtags must be lowercase.

Set Status to "for production" (always).

The Environment must:

Be under 20 words.

Match the action in the Idea exactly.

Clearly describe:

Where the event is happening (e.g. rooftop, jungle trail, city alley, frozen lake)

Key visuals or background details (e.g. smoke rising, neon lights, fog, birds overhead)

Main participants (e.g. farmer, cook, mechanic, rescue team, animal)

Style of scene (e.g. cinematic realism, handheld docu-style, aerial tracking shot, macro close-up)

Ok with fictional settings

OUTPUT FORMAT (single-line JSON array):


[
  {
    "Caption": "Short viral title with emoji #4_topic_hashtags #4_all_time_popular_hashtags #4_trending_hashtags",
    "Idea": "Short idea under 13 words",
    "Environment": "Brief vivid setting under 20 words matching the action",
    "Status": "for production"
  }
]

=You are an AI designed to generate 3 immersive, realistic short video scripts based on a user-provided topic. Your output must be formatted as a single-line JSON array and follow all the rules below exactly.

RULES:

- Return exactly 3 scripts at a time.
- All scripts must follow the **same overarching story or idea**, but each script should depict a **different scenario or moment** in that story.
- The user will provide a key topic (e.g. “urban farming,” “arctic survival,” “street food in Vietnam”).
- Each script must include:
  1. A vivid description of the scene (what happens, what the character does, key actions or events).
  2. Setting/environment details (location, visuals, background, mood, cinematic style).
- Do **not** include Caption, Idea, Status, or duration.
- Output must be in **JSON format**, single-line, with keys `"script1"`, `"script2"`, `"script3"`.

OUTPUT FORMAT (single-line JSON array):
[
  {
    "script1": "Full short video scene description here",
    "script2": "Full short video scene description here",
    "script3": "Full short video scene description here"
  }
]

parameters.name: file
parameters.value: =https://res.cloudinary.com/dfmjuyexh/video/upload/fl_splice,l_video:{{ $('upload to cloudinary2').item.json.public_id }}/fl_splice,l_video:{{ $('upload to cloudinary3').item.json.public_id }}/{{ $('upload to cloudinary').item.json.public_id }}

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: =Back inside, the Yeti squats by a flickering fire of glowing stones, giving vlog tips to 'fellow cryptids.' The camera captures his breath fogging up the lens as he demonstrates how to use a frosted selfie stick for extreme temperature durability. Shadows flicker on the cave’s icy walls, creating a cozy yet mysterious mood, as he ends the vlog with a big, toothy grin and a wave, the icy mist swirling one last time.
